HAPPY KIDS DAY CARE

ABOUT US

Happy Kids Nursery was opened in 2010 and has an Ofsted rating of Excellent. We offer a safe, secure and stimulating environment for children encouraging them to build friendships and enjoy fun activities. Our nursery has a very large outdoor play area which promotes learning through play outdoors.

Our experienced staff are committed to helping every child develop confidence, creativity and social skills. We work closely with parents to ensure that children receive the best possible care and education during their early years.

OUR SERVICES

We provide a range of services to our clients including:

  • Regular school session (9:00 a.m - 6:00 p.m) from Monday - Friday
  • After school session (4:00 p.m - 6:00 p.m) from Monday - Friday
  • Weekend school session (9:00 a.m - 4:00 p.m) on Saturdays

OUR FEES

Childcare from £350.00 per week.
Please call the nursery to discuss your needs.

OUR CLASSES

  1. Little Angels (0 - 18 months)
  2. Golden Feet (18 - 24 months)
  3. The Future Scholars (24 - 36 months)

CONTACT US

Please complete the form below to get in touch.
If you are a new parent and would like to talk to our central enrolments team please call us on 0330 000 0000.

Happy Kids - Learn, Play and Grow!!
